zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cathcart於1480年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特時，他的父親John Cathcart11477歲，母親Margaret Douglas20歲。他於1508年與Margaret Marion在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Cathcart于1480年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特时，他的父亲John Cathcart11477岁，母亲Margaret Douglas20岁。他于1508年与Margaret Marion在英国苏格兰艾斯爾卡爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cathcart was born in 1480, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Cathcart, was 11477 and his mother, Margaret Douglas, was 20. He married Margaret Marion in 1508, in Carleton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 9 September 1513, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cathcart est né en 1480, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cathcart, avait 11477 ans et sa mère, Margaret Douglas, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Marion en 1508, à Carleton, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Cathcart 1480 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cathcart 11477 und seine Mutter Margaret Douglas 20. Er hat 1508 in Carleton, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Marion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cathcart è nato il nel 1480 nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Cathcart, aveva 11477 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Douglas, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Marion nel 1508, nel Carleton, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cathcartが1480年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートで生まれた時，父John Cathcartは11477歳，母Margaret Douglasは20歳であった。1508年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアカーレトンでMargaret Marionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cathcart(이)가 1480년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cathcart(은)는 11477세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Douglas(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1508년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 칼턴에서 Margaret Marion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cathcart nasceu em 1480, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cathcart, tinha 11477 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Douglas, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Marion em 1508, em Carleton, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cathcart родился в 1480 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Cathcart было 11477 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Douglas, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Marion в 1508 г. в местности карлетон, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Cathcart nació en 1480, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Cathcart, tenía 11477 años y su mamá, Margaret Douglas, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Marion en 1508, en Carleton, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
